query:
SELECT awayTeam, homeTeam, startTimeEst, awayBookSpread, bookTotal, awayML, spreadAwayBetsPct, publishedModel
FROM games 
WHERE gameDate = '2026-03-22' AND sport = 'NCAAM'
  AND awayTeam IN ('miami_fl','kentucky','st_johns','tennessee','florida','arizona','ucla','texas_tech')
ORDER BY startTimeEst;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3AW8r3RRauadYzS.root --database MW3FicTy7ae3qrm8dx8Lua --execute 
SELECT awayTeam, homeTeam, startTimeEst, awayBookSpread, bookTotal, awayML, spreadAwayBetsPct, publishedModel
FROM games 
WHERE gameDate = '2026-03-22' AND sport = 'NCAAM'
  AND awayTeam IN ('miami_fl','kentucky','st_johns','tennessee','florida','arizona','ucla','texas_tech')
ORDER BY startTimeEst;
